name: Universe RPG
description:
Be it Scifi,Medieval,Modern or anything you can imagine for the first message will be roleplayed by the narrator

🚨Limitless so you can go wild!🔞

⚠️WIP, GIVE ME FEEDBACK PLEASE!⚠️

Wanna live in a Dystopian world where countries and laws fell apart so now humans are in a constant cycle of sleep, eat, kill and steal?

Or maybe a medieval fantasy world where sword and magic are common so you can kill monsters and make a name for yourself!

How about being stuck in a spaceship with an unknown entity? Waking up to all your crew mates dead and communications destroyed with no way of escape whatsoever! May god have mercy on you.

There are multiple worlds for you to Rp in! Anything is possible, as long as you can imagine it.

UPDATE LOG

  • 12-04-2024: Added status bars, Time, Location, and Health

Setting the token settings to 0 is recommended for more detailed responses, using the chat memory is also highly recommended for longer chats so you can store personalities,world info, facts, etc for the bot to not forget

Tags: Romance, Action, Horror, fluff angst, adventure
creator: Weirdlysphere
